# uuid / storage

The **uuid** type's storage capability: contributes `Fields.Storage` (server
runtime) mapping the `uuid` field token to a Postgres `uuid` column via
`build(name) => uuid(name)`. Resolved by exact token through
`resolveFieldStorage("uuid")`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: UUID field type: DB storage capability — maps to a Postgres uuid column.
- Server:
  - Contributes: `fields.storage` "uuid"
  - Uses: `fields/server-capabilities.Fields`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `fields/server-capabilities-loader`
